fault_type: rrt, rrt_max, request, response, pod_network_receive_bytes, pod_network_receive_packets, pod_network_transmit_bytes, pod_network_transmit_packets
symptom_vector: Network packet corruption and data corruption causing bit errors on network with corrupted packets between services

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [recommendationservice, productcatalogservice] experienced [rrt, rrt_max, request, response, pod_network_receive_bytes, pod_network_receive_packets, pod_network_transmit_bytes, pod_network_transmit_packets] fault.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty components are [recommendationservice, productcatalogservice] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [Rpc, error, code, canceled, desc, context canceled] in Log (From GT key_observations)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [timeout] in Log (From GT key_observations)
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [unavailable] in Log (From GT key_observations)
Step 5: Check Observation - Found keyword [frontend, recommendationservice] in Trace (From GT key_observations)
Step 6: Check Observation - Found keyword [client_error, client_error_ratio, error, error_ratio] in Metric (From GT key_observations)
Step 7: Check Observation - Found keyword [rrt, rrt_max] in Metric (From GT key_observations)
Step 8: Check Observation - Found keyword [request, response] in Metric (From GT key_observations)
Step 9: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_network_receive_bytes, pod_network_receive_packets, pod_network_transmit_bytes, pod_network_transmit_packets] in Metric (From GT key_observations)

Step 10: Derive Root Cause - Based on above network-related features, determined cause is [rrt, rrt_max, request, response, pod_network_receive_bytes, pod_network_receive_packets, pod_network_transmit_bytes, pod_network_transmit_packets]

critical_checks.target: Rpc, error, code, canceled, desc, context canceled
critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries containing 'rpc error: code = Canceled desc = context canceled' appear in frontend logs
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'rpc error: code = Canceled desc = context canceled' in Log data from frontend service
